used_for: lunar-base D2 terrain audition + production terrain (SCENE-BIBLE.md §6): 5 m/px LOLA DEMs -> dem_to_displacement.py -> 1:1 Blender displacement
usage_terms: US Government work / public domain (NASA PDS policy: free, unrestricted); attribution requested
citation: Barker, M.K. et al. (2021), 'Improved LOLA elevation maps for south pole landing sites', Planetary and Space Science 203, doi:10.1016/j.pss.2020.105119
